About Our School

🏭

Founded on a Vision of Light

M.A. Senior Secondary School was founded in 2014. Run by the R.D. Foundation (NAZMM), we are a beacon of quality education in Lala, Hailakandi — nurturing students across Science, Arts and Commerce.

About R.D. Foundation

The R.D. Foundation (NAZMM) is a non-profit trust committed to educational upliftment in the Barak Valley. We provide affordable, quality education with modern facilities, skilled teachers, and a holistic curriculum.

🏆 A Decade of Excellence

★ Since 2014 • 10+ Years Strong

Why Choose Us

🔬

Modern Science Labs

Fully equipped Physics, Chemistry & Biology labs

📺

Digital Classrooms

Smart boards and multimedia projectors

📚

🏆

Sports & Culture

Annual sports day, cultural programmes and competitions

🏫 Our Faculty

Our faculty are the backbone of M.A. Senior Secondary School — a dedicated team of highly qualified educators with decades of combined experience. Each teacher brings deep subject mastery, a passion for student growth, and a commitment to nurturing every learner’s potential. From guiding students through competitive exam preparation to mentoring them through personal challenges, our staff go beyond textbooks to build confident, capable young minds.

Academic Streams

Science Stream (Class XI–XII)

Prepare for engineering, medicine & research.

PhysicsChemistryBiologyMathematicsEnglishComputer Sc.

Arts Stream (Class XI–XII)

Ideal for law, teaching and public service.

HistoryPolitical ScienceEconomicsBengali/AssameseEnglishSociology

Commerce Stream (Class XI–XII)

Master business, finance and accounting.

AccountancyBusiness StudiesEconomicsMathematicsEnglish
